statements.sql: Connection Established
select * from `users` where `id` = 1 limit 1
select sum(`total`) as aggregate from `orders` where `payment_status` = 'paid' and `status` = 'delivered' and date(`created_at`) = '2026-04-12'
select sum(`total`) as aggregate from `orders` where `payment_status` = 'paid' and `status` = 'delivered' and `created_at` between '2026-04-01 00:00:00' and '2026-04-12 17:17:55'

select
products.id,
products.name,
MAX(CASE WHEN product_images.is_primary = 1 THEN product_images.image_path ELSE NULL END) as image_path,
SUM(order_items.quantity) as total_quantity,
SUM(order_items.subtotal) as total_revenue
from `order_items` inner join `orders` on `order_items`.`order_id` = `orders`.`id` inner join `product_variants` on `order_items`.`product_variant_id` = `product_variants`.`id` inner join `products` on `product_variants`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join `product_images` on `products`.`id` = `product_images`.`product_id` where `orders`.`payment_status` = 'paid' and `orders`.`status` = 'delivered' and `orders`.`created_at` between '2026-04-01 00:00:00' and '2026-04-12 17:17:55' group by `products`.`id`, `products`.`name` order by `total_quantity` desc limit 10
select * from `orders` order by `created_at` desc limit 10
